# TextFSM Online

> https://textfsm.xdai.vip/

Online TextFSM template parser. Paste CLI output from network devices (Cisco, Huawei, H3C, etc.), select a TextFSM template, and get structured JSON instantly.

## Features

- Real-time parsing — input raw CLI text and template, results update automatically
- Built-in template library — ntc-templates + Elinpf/ntc-templates (Chinese vendor templates)
- CodeMirror 6 editor with syntax highlighting for TextFSM templates and JSON output
- Dark mode, font size control, line wrap toggle
- Copy, download, clear per editor pane
- Share parsed results via link

## Use Case

Network engineers and NetDevOps practitioners use TextFSM to convert semi-structured CLI output (show commands, routing tables, interface status) into structured data for automation pipelines.
